mapper.insert: insert into student_notice (student_id, title, content, type, biz_type, biz_id, publish_time, read_flag, read_time, created_at, updated_at) values (#{studentId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{type}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{publishTime}, #{readFlag}, #{readTime}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select count(*) from student_notice where student_id = #{studentId} and read_flag = '0'
